recommendation.reason: The declared alpha remains unsupported but the bounded scale plan is still viable.
recommendation.hypothesis: Collect the next preplanned mixed-temperature batch, then compare within-temperature error and acceptance before deciding whether full-mix scaling remains justified.

review.notes: Adds a within-temperature diagnostic to the frozen scale step.

recommendation.reason: The scoped protocol has reached its held-out target-alpha endpoint.
recommendation.hypothesis: Preserve the certificate and audit its provenance before opening any separately scoped target or predictor study.

review.notes: Correctly freezes the scope but mainly restates the deterministic plan.

recommendation.reason: The current split cannot attain the declared alpha even with zero observed errors.
recommendation.hypothesis: Preregister a per-target study with enough independent certification rows for alpha 0.2 feasibility and include fresh targets selected without outcome labels.

review.notes: Adds explicit held-out feasibility and label-blind selection requirements.

recommendation.reason: Fit selection is complete and the frozen rules still require independent certification.
recommendation.hypothesis: Evaluate only the five eligible target rules on the independent certification rows and report the selective rule separately from trust-all controls.

review.notes: Faithfully executes the locked certification stage.

recommendation.reason: The required selective certificate failed and the locked panel endpoint is unreachable.
recommendation.hypothesis: Preregister a successor that audits biological representation validity before collecting any new selective-signal evidence.

review.notes: Selects a distinct failure axis instead of rescuing W2b.

recommendation.reason: The prospective design is powered, but fresh exclusion-audited targets are still missing.
recommendation.hypothesis: Select eight source-disjoint targets and audit interaction-class diversity before binding any execution packet.

review.notes: Adds an interaction-class diversity audit to fresh target selection.

recommendation.reason: All eight input pairs are ready and the next evidence stage is already frozen.
recommendation.hypothesis: Verify all MSA and report hashes, then construct the separately reviewed 8 by 60 threshold-learning packet.

review.notes: Concrete but equivalent to the deterministic packet-building step.

recommendation.reason: Zero targets qualify against a preregistered minimum of three.
recommendation.hypothesis: Test native-complex recoverability with an independent predictor before generating any new candidate designs.

review.notes: Moves to a distinct predictor-based failure-localization question.

recommendation.reason: The frozen mechanism panel has reached a context-dependent terminal outcome.
recommendation.hypothesis: Build a fresh matched-protocol predictor panel stratified by representation validity to localize where label disagreements arise.

review.notes: Adds prospective representation stratification to matched prediction.

recommendation.reason: The powered design is frozen and target inputs are its only missing prerequisite.
recommendation.hypothesis: Precompute and hash-lock only the eight target MSAs, then replay the design audit before candidate generation.

review.notes: Matches the already frozen prerequisite stage.

recommendation.reason: MSA preparation is complete and the deterministic post-MSA audit remains pending.
recommendation.hypothesis: Replay the post-MSA design and power audit, then freeze a separate fit-stage packet if it passes.

review.notes: Executes the locked audit without broadening authority.

recommendation.reason: No frozen rule qualifies and the required coverage exceeds the global risk cap.
recommendation.hypothesis: Preregister a validity-first panel that separates native recoverability from generator yield on fresh targets.

review.notes: Separates two failure mechanisms that W3b confounded.

recommendation.reason: The validity-first successor is active but lacks a prospectively valid target panel.
recommendation.hypothesis: Discover eight source-disjoint complete target-binder dimers and audit semantic and geometric validity before prediction.

recommendation.reason: The representation-valid target panel is frozen and now needs input preparation only.
recommendation.hypothesis: Prepare a hash-bound MSA-only packet and verify that it grants no downstream prediction authority.

recommendation.reason: The local packet is ready, but remote parity and zero-submit behavior remain unverified.
recommendation.hypothesis: Mirror the bound artifacts to Cayuga and run a no-submit dry-run with local and remote hash parity checks.

review.notes: Restates the exact integrity check required by the packet.

recommendation.reason: The loop deferred every candidate because the current screen produced non-finite scores.
recommendation.hypothesis: Evaluate a trained replacement screen on held-out candidate verdicts and finite-score coverage before resuming any build-selection campaign.

review.notes: Adds held-out verdict quality and finite-score coverage as re-entry checks.
